profile_summary: An undergraduate pursuing a B.Sc (Honours) in Optometry with a strong interest in eye health and vision care, passionate about developing clinical skills and contributing to community health initiatives.
Technical_skills: Subjective refraction, Objective refraction, Colour vision test, Vision and visual acuity check, Soft and hard contact lens fitting, Test for stereopsis, Slit lamp, keratometer, focimeter use
soft_skills: Teamwork, Communication, Event coordination, Peer collaboration, Time management, Leadership, Community service, Adaptability, Problem-solving

projects.project_details: Actively participated as an Eye Checker in community eye camps, conducted basic vision assessments, assisted in identifying common eye conditions, and supported the medical team in delivering community eye care services.

Member of the Optometry Student Association, actively involved in organizational activities and student-led initiatives, contributed to event coordination, peer collaboration, and programs aimed at promoting eye health awareness and professional development within the optometry field.
Internship trainee at Bank of Ceylon, gained experience in banking operations and customer service.
